title: Basic Scatter Plot
description: Create a simple scatter plot using ggplot2 with x and y mappings.
problemStatement:
Visualize trends! Load `library(ggplot2)`. Using the built-in `mtcars` data set, create a scatter plot of `mpg` (y-axis) against `wt` (x-axis).

**Requirement:** Use `ggplot()` and `geom_point()`.
hints: ggplot2 uses a layer-based syntax combined with `+`.
expectedOutput: A ggplot object representing a scatter plot
solutionCode:
library(ggplot2)
plot <- ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = wt, y = mpg)) + geom_point()
print(plot)
